title: CHILD WELFARE SERVICES - 211info
text: MIDTOWN CHILD WELFARE CHILD WELFARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides help in keeping families united. Finds temporary and permanent homes for children who need them, including foster and adoptive homes. The program also teaches people how to become resource parents. 815 NE Davis Street Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed on major holidays (971) 673-1800 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 673-1800 TTY/TTD (833) 685-0841 ODHS Language Access and Accommodations INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Adoption Services Family Preservation Programs Foster Home Placement Foster Parent/Family Recruitment Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILD ABUSE REPORTING MUTUAL SUPPORT - FOSTER, ADOPT, AND KINSHIP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
